name: Space Bubbles
author: Poki
description: Space Bubbles is a high quality bubble shooting game based on the golden oldie bubble-shooters. This game is set in a space environment and it contains 80 levels with increasing difficulties, so don't worry about finishing this game any time soon! How to play: Match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to make them disappear and clear the level. Aim with your mouse and shoot the bubbles by clicking directly on target or via the wall. About the creator: RedFoc is the creator of this bubble shooting game.
